title: Event controls in class methods
body:
After #3363 it's possible to use delays in methods. However, using event controls like:
```systemverilog
    class EventClass;
        event e;

        task sleep; @e; endtask
        task wake; ->e; endtask
    endclass
```
currently results in a C++ compile error (if we remove the `E_UNSUPPORTED` check):
```
Vt_timing_class___024root__DepSet_h748003df__0.cpp: In function ‘void Vt_timing_class___024root___eval_triggers__act(Vt_timing_class___024root*)’:
Vt_timing_class___024root__DepSet_h748003df__0.cpp:23:77: error: invalid use of non-static data member ‘Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e’
   23 |     vlSelf->__VactTriggered.at(2U) = Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e.isFired();
      |                                                                             ^~~~~~~~
In file included from Vt_timing_class__Syms.h:19,
                 from Vt_timing_class.cpp:5,
                 from Vt_timing_class__ALL.cpp:3:
Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass__Vclpkg.h:35:13: note: declared here
   35 |     VlEvent __PVT__e;
      |             ^~~~~~~~
Vt_timing_class___024root__DepSet_h748003df__0.cpp:30:48: error: invalid use of non-static data member ‘Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e’
   30 |     if (Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e.isFired()) {
      |                                                ^~~~~~~~
Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass__Vclpkg.h:35:13: note: declared here
   35 |     VlEvent __PVT__e;
      |             ^~~~~~~~
Vt_timing_class___024root__DepSet_h748003df__0.cpp:31:48: error: invalid use of non-static data member ‘Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e’
   31 |         Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e.clearFired();
      |                                                ^~~~~~~~
Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass__Vclpkg.h:35:13: note: declared here
   35 |     VlEvent __PVT__e;
      |             ^~~~~~~~
Vt_timing_class___024root__DepSet_h748003df__0.cpp:32:90: error: invalid use of non-static data member ‘Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e’
   32 |         vlSymsp->enqueueTriggeredEventForClearing(Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass::__PVT__e);
      |                                                                                          ^~~~~~~~
Vt_timing_class_t__03a__03aEventClass__Vclpkg.h:35:13: note: declared here
   35 |     VlEvent __PVT__e;
      |             ^~~~~~~~
```
This is because Verilator is trying to eval it in the trigger eval function, which obviously doesn't make sense.
I'm already [working on it](https://github.com/antmicro/verilator-1/pull/8), it'll be the next PR after #3363.
